title: Dirty state and destructive navigation safety implementation

verified_baseline.worktree_and_index: clean before implementation; no untracked files

callers_inspected: src/features/board/PgnChessBoard.vue and src/features/board/pgn/usePgnChessBoard.ts (dormant parallel component evidence only)

defects_reproduced.before: The canonical workspace had no dirty owner, unsaved local-change indication, route/browser leave guard, source-replacement confirmation, or manual-draft safety boundary.
defects_reproduced.after: The PGN Store owns typed source and draft revisions, the source/status region describes unsaved work, and all reachable destructive callers use one guarded confirmation coordinator.

defects_reproduced.before: Local PGN replacement could finish after a newer source, manual cancel/reset/clear destroyed drafts immediately, annotation clear used a one-off dialog, and provider confirmation replacement could lose focus or stack intent state.
defects_reproduced.after: Source session/revision/draft identity is rechecked around asynchronous waits, draft mutations are guarded independently, annotation clear is coordinated, and provider confirmation settlement is one-shot with explicit return focus.

dirty_state_owner.reason: The existing PGN Store already owns active source identity, canonical move trees, annotations, and every implemented canonical mutation. Workspace Store remains layout-only.

source_model.sourceSession: Monotonic in-memory generation changed after each successful source establishment or discard.
source_model.sourceRevision: Incremented only after an actual successful local canonical mutation.
source_model.cleanSourceRevision: Baseline established for a newly opened source or new editable local copy.
source_model.dirty_rule: Local editable source and sourceRevision differs from cleanSourceRevision.

manual_draft_model.sourceSession_and_sourceId: Bind the draft to the source generation from which it was initialized.
manual_draft_model.baselineFen: First normalized generated editor snapshot after initialization, avoiding raw-FEN clock/en-passant false positives.
manual_draft_model.currentFen_and_revision: Idempotent FEN-based draft change tracking; returning to the normalized baseline is clean.

dirty_state_owner.async_identity: WorkspaceEditIdentity captures source session, source ID, canonical revision, draft ID, draft revision, and current draft FEN.

dirty_transition_matrix.action: Successful local PGN open or source replacement
Fresh manual position applied without a draft change
Successful PGN insertion into the same authorized local source
New resolved main line or variation
Enter manual editor and establish normalized baseline
Change piece placement, side to move, or castling state

dirty_transition_matrix.result: canonical dirty; draft discarded after success

dirty_transition_matrix.action: Analysis assessment explicitly written through the dormant typed boundary
dirty_transition_matrix.result: canonical dirty with source session/revision guard

actions_excluded_from_dirty_tracking: existing move navigation and variation expansion
panel, tab, drawer, sheet, toolbar, splitter, board alignment, and orientation changes
analysis execution without explicit PGN mutation

destructive_action_matrix.guard: Vue Router leave guard; exact requested destination continues once only after confirmation
Vue Router update guard only when handoff query identity changes

destructive_action_matrix.intent: open replacement local PGN or file drop
destructive_action_matrix.guard: candidate read and strict parse occur first; active source remains unchanged until guarded execution
shared coordinator; successful copy begins a clean source session
shared coordinator replaces the former one-off dialog
confirmation discards the draft only; cancellation preserves it

destructive_action_matrix.intent: clear or reset dirty manual draft
destructive_action_matrix.guard: confirmation wraps the exact board mutation and rechecks draft identity
no active product caller exists; no new UI or unsupported action was invented

route_guard_behavior.clean_leave: Allowed immediately; a clean draft is discarded only after a successful transition.
route_guard_behavior.dirty_leave: One safe-first confirmation; cancellation returns false with state intact; confirmation returns true to the original navigation without router recursion.
route_guard_behavior.duplicate_navigation: Dirty route guards use one shared confirmation promise and an explicit latest-destination-wins policy. A later destructive route attempt replaces only the pending target and return-focus owner, joins the same confirmation, and is the only target allowed to complete; afterEach consumes only that exact target route object.
route_guard_behavior.successful_discard: The exact captured session is discarded only after successful navigation or the matching unmount fallback, never when permission is merely requested.
route_guard_behavior.focus: Direct in-page navigation restores the connected trigger on cancel; history navigation with no captured trigger uses the focusable workspace main fallback.

beforeunload_behavior.registration: A beforeunload listener is added synchronously only while canonical local state or a manual draft is dirty.
beforeunload_behavior.handler: Only preventDefault and returnValue assignment are used; browser-native warning copy is not controlled.
beforeunload_behavior.cleanup: Listener is removed immediately when clean and on workspace unmount.
beforeunload_behavior.runtime_inspection: A temporary page-runtime listener counter observed added=1 after a real annotation mutation and removed=1 after confirmed workspace leave.
beforeunload_behavior.automation_limitation: Controlled Chrome and Playwright reload primitives auto-handle or suppress the native warning UI, so warning text and user-choice rendering were not asserted.

manual_editor_draft_behavior.initialization: The editor can start from an empty workspace; its first post-render normalized FEN becomes the clean baseline.
manual_editor_draft_behavior.isolation: Draft FEN/revision lives beside, but separately from, canonical source revision; palette selection alone does not dirty.
manual_editor_draft_behavior.close: Clean drafts close directly. Dirty drafts require confirmation; Escape/cancel preserves the exact draft and focus.
manual_editor_draft_behavior.clear_reset: No-op clear/reset avoids confirmation. Actual clear/reset is executed once after confirmation and remains a draft relative to the original baseline when different.
manual_editor_draft_behavior.apply: Success uses the existing FEN-to-PGN boundary, marks changed canonical content dirty, clears the draft, and closes the editor. Failure leaves the editor and draft intact.
manual_editor_draft_behavior.replacement: Successful source replacement closes and invalidates the old editor draft; cancellation or failure does not.

confirmation_focus_and_reentrancy_contra.surface: Provider-owned ProductDialog with alertdialog role for destructive intents.
confirmation_focus_and_reentrancy_contra.dismissal: Escape cancels; dangerous dialogs have no close button and are not mask-closable.
confirmation_focus_and_reentrancy_contra.focus_trap: Tab and Shift+Tab remain within the dialog.
confirmation_focus_and_reentrancy_contra.focus_return: Exact connected trigger for in-page actions, including a confirmation nested over the narrow source drawer; workspace main fallback for history navigation.
confirmation_focus_and_reentrancy_contra.provider_reentrancy: An active or settling provider confirmation rejects a new request rather than replacing content.
confirmation_focus_and_reentrancy_contra.coordinator_reentrancy: One in-flight action. Repeated route attempts join one confirmation under the explicit latest-destination policy; unrelated conflicting destructive actions are rejected deterministically. Dialogs never stack and actions never double-execute.
confirmation_focus_and_reentrancy_contra.settlement: Resolver is cleared before close callbacks; active request remains through the close tick so focus restoration can finish.

stale_action_protection: Capture WorkspaceEditIdentity before native file selection or drop processing.
Recheck source session, source ID, canonical revision, draft identity, draft revision, and draft FEN after File.text().
Strict-parse candidate text before destructive confirmation without assigning it to the active source.
Recheck the exact identity after dialog wait and immediately before destructive execution.
Ignore late file completion after runtime unmount.
Analysis requests and the dormant assessment writer include source session and revision guards.
Failed parse, read, cancellation, or stale rejection preserves the original source and dirty state.

tools: Build Web Apps Browser and Chrome control
Chrome native macOS file chooser through Computer Use
Playwright CLI in temporary-output sessions for viewport and runtime inspection
browser_validation.fixtures: Three temporary PGN files were created under /tmp, used through real file selection, then deleted. A browser-accessible transient copy used only for the final nested-focus recheck was also deleted with all Playwright output. No fixture, screenshot, trace, or browser artifact exists in the repository.
browser_validation.no_source: Left for /competitions without confirmation and returned to a non-empty workspace DOM.
browser_validation.local_open: Real temporary PGN A and B each opened as distinct local sources and began without an unsaved-change indication.
browser_validation.navigation_clean: Selecting existing move e4 and returning to the initial node changed board position/selection without marking dirty.
browser_validation.variation_dirty: A real keyboard move e2-e3 was resolved as a variation and produced the local unsaved-change indication.
browser_validation.annotation_dirty: A real board highlight enabled undo/clear and marked the local source dirty; confirmed clear executed once and remained dirty.
browser_validation.manual_draft: Fresh editor baseline was clean; changing side-to-move was draft-only; close cancellation preserved it; confirmed reset returned clean; changed apply created canonical dirty state.
browser_validation.source_replacement: Dirty manual source to PGN B was cancelled once with state intact, then confirmed once; B replaced it and began clean.
browser_validation.failed_replacement: A strict-parse failure for an invalid PGN showed no destructive confirmation and preserved dirty PGN B.
browser_validation.route_guard: Dirty direct navigation opened one safe-first alertdialog; Escape preserved URL/source/dirty state and returned focus to the exact 赛事 link; confirmation navigated once and the subsequent clean browser back returned to an empty clean workspace.
browser_validation.duplicate_request: Two simultaneous dirty route attempts for 赛事 and then 登录 produced one alertdialog. Accepting it completed the explicit latest destination (/login) once, with no intermediate /competitions navigation and no remaining dialog.
browser_validation.focus: Safe initial focus, Tab to destructive action, Shift+Tab back to safe action, Escape cancellation, direct-link trigger return, and exact nested source-drawer 打开 PGN trigger return all passed.
browser_validation.beforeunload: Temporary runtime instrumentation observed one dirty registration and one cleanup removal; native browser warning UI is automation-managed and was not asserted.
browser_validation.readonly: The real /competitions/47347/display venue route rendered read-only controls with no PGN open, editor, annotation, or dirty confirmation surface.
browser_validation.contract_blocked: The /match/dev-slice-005-blocked route rendered its truthful unavailable action with no editing controls, dirty status, or confirmation; no fake data was introduced.
browser_validation.themes: The settings selector was exercised by keyboard through light and dark, then restored to system preference; no dirty state was created.
browser_validation.responsive: Playwright snapshots at 1280x900 and 390x844 both had non-empty DOM and the approved desktop/narrow compositions.
browser_validation.runtime_health: No Vite error overlay and no breaking application console error. A separate Playwright session observed only the existing non-breaking favicon.ico 404.

cor_impact.MISSING-UI-004: Implemented for the active unified workspace, local PGN/source replacement, annotations, route leave, beforeunload, and manual editor draft.
cor_impact.COR-020: DEV-SLICE-005 dirty-state/destructive-navigation portion implemented. No authority-wide backlog closure is claimed.

od_boundaries.OD-02: No autosave, recovery duration, teaching persistence, or Dexie table added.
od_boundaries.OD-03: No AI default or persistence decision asserted.
od_boundaries.OD-04: No full-game analysis scope or automatic insertion activated.
od_boundaries.OD-05_to_OD-11: Remain open and unchanged; no provisional value was promoted to authority.

limitations: Browser automation controls auto-handle or suppress the browser-native beforeunload warning UI; listener registration and cleanup were verified by temporary runtime instrumentation instead of asserting native copy or user-choice rendering.

No confirmed protected replay/commentary contract currently exposes an editable-local-copy action in a naturally reachable browser state. The local-copy replacement caller and Store guards were reviewed and statically validated without projecting fake product data.

Stale async protection was validated through captured identity/revision code paths and failed replacement behavior; no timing-dependent artificial File.text override was injected into product runtime.
The dormant analysis assessment writer remains without a UI caller. Ordinary analysis remains non-mutating by architecture; no new analysis insertion capability was activated.
remaining_deferred_work: Contract-backed replay, live, cloud, share, clock, hardware, and persistence capabilities remain blocked.
Dormant PgnChessBoard runtime consolidation remains outside DEV-SLICE-005.
Whole-PGN clear/reset UI remains absent; no unsupported destructive action was invented.
